title: NewTrials
description: Mod backported trials chambers with small modifications.
body:
**🟩 New Trials
Trial Chambers Backport for Minecraft 1.20.1**

New Trials brings content from the latest Minecraft versions back into Minecraft 1.20.1, allowing players to enjoy new blocks, items, mobs, and structures without updating their game version.

The mod focuses not only on faithfully backporting vanilla content, but also on expanding it with additional features and modding possibilities.
 

*****

⚒️ CurseForge version: [Here](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ntrials)

*****

**✨ Features
🧱 New Blocks, Items & Entities**

- Copper Doors, Copper Trapdoors & Copper Bulbs
- Breeze & Bogged mobs
- Other blocks and items from the latest Minecraft versions
- Cartographer map functionality
- Trial Chambers:
   - Breeze Boss
   - Larger and expanded structure

All mechanics and behavior are preserved as close to vanilla Minecraft as possible.

*****

**🧩 Modding & Custom Integration**

You can create your own mod that uses our:

*   spawner systems
*   vaults
*   custom loot tables

**🏷️ Tagging Functions**

*   Vault: `{BlockEntityTag:{vault_tag:"KEY_TAG",loot_table:"LOOTABLE"}}`
*   Key tags: `{vault_tag:"KEY_TAG"}`
*   Spawner tags: `{BlockEntityTag:{NormalLootTable:"LOOTABLE",OminousLootTable:"LOOTABLE"}}`
*   Boss Spawner tags: `{BlockEntityTag:{key_tag:"KEY_TAG",BossLootTable:"LOOTABLE"}}`

***

**🛠 Requirements**
- Minecraft 1.20.1
- Forge 47.4.0

*****

**📌 Notes**
- This mod is not just a simple vanilla backport
- It adds additional content, extensions, and customization options
- Suitable for players, modpacks, and mod developers
